---
title: "PHYS401 - Foundation Physics B"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

---

::: {.callout-warning}
I have not written this page yet, please check again later.
:::

My role in this course is basically just to help with labs, but I may add some more information about the course content if I can find the time.


| *Lab Information*                 |
| --------------------------------- |
| [Lab One](./Labs/Lab One.qmd)     |
| [Lab Two](./Labs/Lab Two.qmd)     |
| [Lab Three](./Labs/Lab Three.qmd) |
| [Lab Four](./Labs/Lab Four.qmd)   |
